title: Herbal Age Grow Your Own Herb Garden Kit, 12 Herbs Plants, 8700 Herb Seed Box for Planting UK, Salad Leaves, Basil Seeds, Mint, Cress Seeds, Veg Plant Gardening Gift for Men, Women, Kids

Ideal as gardeners gifts, this kit enhances your kitchen with fresh, homegrown flavors. Also includes options for house plant seeds and easy grow-your-own kits.

GARDEN GIFTS FOR WOMEN THAT BRING JOY: This seed growing kit is perfect for beginners and experienced gardeners alike, making it a great choice for gifts for gardeners women, kids, and anyone with a green thumb. Give a unique Christmas, housewarming, or birthday gift with fresh herb seeds gifts that flourish indoors, including a variety of vegetable seeds and vibrant mint, ideal for plant lovers and culinary enthusiasts.

ALL-YEAR-ROUND GROWING. Our curated collection of garden seeds includes parsley seeds and more, offering unusual gifts for women who love gardening. Create a charming indoor herb garden or start plants outdoors in any season. Perfect as plant gifts for women, this set brings the joy of gardening to every time of year, whether in the kitchen or greenhouse.

EASY TO EAT WELL. Growing herb plants at home brings fresh flavors right to your kitchen, turning meals into something special. Whether making chive-infused butter with chive seeds for potatoes, crafting a zesty rocket dressing, or adding fresh mint from your own mint seeds to salads, these herbs are the secret to elevated dishes. Perfect as cooking gifts for women, this collection is ideal for anyone who loves fresh flavors in their meals.

DROWN IN HERBS WITH 8,700+ SEEDS. This seed mix offers over 8,700 seeds, including sage seeds, for growing a variety of 12 culinary herbs at home. It’s a fantastic way to start your own herb garden affordably, perfect for fresh greens to enhance any meal. An ideal gift for garden lovers or garden gifts for couples, this seed kit makes a thoughtful and practical addition to any green thumb’s collection.
description: Product Description GROW A KITCHEN HERB GARDEN BURSTING WITH FRESH FLAVOUR This premium herb seed box contains over 8,700 high-quality seeds across 12 essential varieties , giving you everything you need to grow flavourful herbs all year round. Inside, you’ll find Basil (0.5g ~ 325 seeds), Thyme (0.3g ~ 1,500 seeds), Spinach (3g ~ 210 seeds), Mint (0.1g ~ 170 seeds), Rosemary (0.05g ~ 25 seeds), Garden Cress (5g ~ 2,000 seeds), Rocket (2g ~ 700 seeds), Lettuce (2g ~ 1,600 seeds), Dill (3g ~ 1,800 seeds), Parsley (2g ~ 1,000 seeds), Coriander (2g ~ 300 seeds), and Chive (1g ~ 800 seeds). Carefully curated for indoor or outdoor planting, this grow-your-own herb kit offers a rewarding gardening experience and delicious harvests for every season. A THOUGHTFUL GARDENING GIFT THAT KEEPS ON GIVING Whether you’re looking for a meaningful gift for her, unique gifts for men, or a wholesome project for the kids, this herb seed starter kit is a charming choice. Packaged in a beautiful and practical seed box, it's perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, Christmas or simply as a way to say “I’m thinking of you.” EASY TO EAT WELL — DIRECTLY FROM YOUR WINDOWSILL Add your freshly grown herbs to your home cooking and elevate every dish. From chive butter for potatoes , to homemade pesto , or rocket-infused dressings for tacos , this indoor herb garden helps you enjoy flavour-packed, homegrown goodness every day. FOR EVERY SKILL LEVEL, EVERY GARDEN Perfect for beginners and seasoned green thumbs alike, these herb seeds for planting UK are suitable for pots, windowsills, greenhouses, patios or allotments. Whether you’ve got a large outdoor garden or just a sunny kitchen counter, this herb kit brings fresh flavour to any space. GROW HERBS ALL YEAR ROUND Our seed selection ensures year-round planting opportunities—spring, summer, autumn or winter. Designed to grow both indoors and outdoors, these seeds are a perfect way to enjoy fresh, fragrant herbs even during the colder months. PREMIUM QUALITY & LONG-LASTING STORAGE Each seed is carefully packed and inspected to ensure premium germination and long shelf life. Store your seeds in a dry, cool, and dark place —a ziplock bag with the air pressed out is ideal for keeping unused seeds fresh and viable.
